allow: Bash(node -e "const sc = require\(''suncalc''\); const p = sc.getPosition\(new Date\(''2024-03-21T12:00:00Z''\), 0, 0\); console.log\(p\);")

Bash(node -e "const sc = require\(''suncalc''\); const t = sc.getTimes\(new Date\(''2024-06-21''\), 40.4, -3.7\); console.log\(''solarNoon:'', t.solarNoon.toUTCString\(\)\); const p = sc.getPosition\(t.solarNoon, 40.4, -3.7\); const az = \(p.azimuth * 180/Math.PI + 180\); console.log\(''azimuth at noon:'', az, ''elevation:'', p.altitude*180/Math.PI\);")
